title: Orthopedic referral documentation
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Supports clinician-documented RICE, activity protection, mobilization, analgesia, physical therapy, return to activity, one-week review, worsening review, and urgent escalation for severe, neurovascular, deformity, weight-bearing, fever, or hot-joint concerns.
assessment.rationale: Supports clinician-led referral for sprain and strain contexts for orthopaedic referral documentation; no decision is generated.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Muscle Sprains & Strains – 47
source.population: People with muscle sprains or strains suitable for virtual assessment.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed healthcare facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for sprain- or strain-compatible injury documentation in Dubai telehealth; partial for broad foot, hand, sports, fracture, operative, or diagnosis-specific workflows.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports clinician-documented RICE, activity protection, mobilization, analgesia, physical therapy, return to activity, one-week review, worsening review, and urgent escalation for severe, neurovascular, deformity, weight-bearing, fever, or hot-joint concerns.

assessment.text: Defines concern and specialist contexts including a hot swollen joint, persistent fever, night symptoms, weight loss, face-to-face assessment needs, worsening symptoms, severe functional limitation, and selected imaging.
assessment.rationale: Supports clinician-led osteoarthritis referral for orthopaedic referral documentation; no decision is generated.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Osteoarthritis – 28
source.population: Adults with osteoarthritis symptoms, particularly middle-aged and older adults.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed healthcare facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for osteoarthritis-compatible knee and hip documentation in Dubai telehealth; partial for undifferentiated joint pain, acute injury, and settings outside Dubai.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines concern and specialist contexts including a hot swollen joint, persistent fever, night symptoms, weight loss, face-to-face assessment needs, worsening symptoms, severe functional limitation, and selected imaging.

assessment.text: Supports selected two-view radiography, states ultrasound or MRI is rarely indicated without an agreed specialist pathway, and links persistent symptoms to clinician-arranged referral.
assessment.rationale: Supports shoulder imaging and referral context for orthopaedic referral documentation; no decision is generated.

source.title: Shoulder Pain: Diagnosis, Treatment and Referral Guidelines for Primary, Community and Intermediate Care
source.population: Adults with common shoulder conditions in primary, community, or intermediate care.
source.setting: Primary, community, and intermediate musculoskeletal care.
source.exclusions: Exact for shoulder red flags, broad assessment, subacromial pain, frozen shoulder, glenohumeral arthritis, and instability; international and partial for a generic UAE shoulder-pain workflow.

exact_location.heading: Subacromial Shoulder Pain — imaging and referral

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports selected two-view radiography, states ultrasound or MRI is rarely indicated without an agreed specialist pathway, and links persistent symptoms to clinician-arranged referral.

sources_used.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Muscle Sprains & Strains – 47
DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Osteoarthritis – 28
Shoulder Pain: Diagnosis, Treatment and Referral Guidelines for Primary, Community and Intermediate Care
